query:
SELECT id, entity, status, row_count, error_message, started_at, finished_at,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, started_at, COALESCE(finished_at, NOW())) as duration_sec
FROM sync_logs
WHERE section = 'Boonphone' AND started_at >= '2026-05-07 10:00:00'
ORDER BY id ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT id, entity, status, row_count, error_message, started_at, finished_at,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, started_at, COALESCE(finished_at, NOW())) as duration_sec
FROM sync_logs
